baseline_requirements: Unified registry JSON should be validated by a published schema
doc_id is deprecated in favor of file_id
Write policy must map to derivation rules
Bundle roles should be documented and enforced
clarified_requirements: Schema v4 must validate the current unified registry data shape
doc_id references are allowed only in explicit legacy sections
Every auto-updated field must have a derivation or be manual-only
Role taxonomy includes RULE and SHARED_LIB if used in data
CI must enforce schema validation and no-doc-id checks

changes.before: Unified registry JSON should be validated by a published schema.
changes.after: Schema v4 must validate the current unified registry data shape.
changes.rationale: Audit shows schema v3 mismatch with data version.
changes.reviewer_focus: Confirm schema v4 aligns with registry JSON fields.

changes.before: doc_id is deprecated in favor of file_id.
changes.after: doc_id references are allowed only in explicit legacy sections.
changes.rationale: Reduce ambiguity while preserving historical context.
changes.reviewer_focus: Check docs for clear legacy labeling and no doc_id in live specs.

changes.before: Write policy must map to derivation rules.
changes.after: Every auto-updated field must have a derivation or be manual-only.
changes.rationale: Audit found fields marked auto-updated without formulas.
changes.reviewer_focus: Verify policy/derivation alignment for all columns.

changes.before: Bundle roles should be documented and enforced.
changes.after: Role taxonomy includes RULE and SHARED_LIB if used in data.
changes.rationale: Data contains roles not documented in current taxonomy.
changes.reviewer_focus: Confirm role enums and docs match actual usage.

changes.after: CI must enforce schema validation and no-doc-id checks.
changes.rationale: Audit identified missing CI gates for critical validations.
changes.reviewer_focus: Check workflow steps and required scripts.
